title: Meladerma insularum

The family Melastomataceae is a group of plants commonly known as the "memecyclid" or "melastome" family. This family consists of flowering plants native to tropical and subtropical regions, including Africa and Asia. The classification of Meladerma insularum is part of the broader plant taxonomy that groups plants based on shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
